title: Fermented Silky Cozy Jasmine Rice Stir-fry
description: A creamy and comforting vegan dish featuring fermented jasmine rice stir-fried with a mix of aromatic vegetables and spices for a touch of coziness.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fermented jasmine rice
ingredients.notes: Use pre-soaked and fermented rice, as it has a unique texture.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: For acidity to counterbalance the rice's richness.

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon black salt (or regular salt for non-vegan)
ingredients.notes: A blend of sea and rock salt, or regular salt can be used if not using fermented rice.

instructions: Heat a pan with coconut cream over medium heat. Add the fermented jasmine rice and stir until it starts to turn golden brown.
Stir in minced garlic, green onions, diced bell pepper, and grated ginger. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Drizzle lime juice over the mixture to enhance its aroma and acidity balance. Cook for an additional minute to let flavors meld together.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste. Garnish with extra green onions if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
